eas_text: A civil authority has issued A CHILD ABDUCTION EMERGENCY for the following counties or areas: Los Angeles; Orange; Riverside; San Bernardino; Ventura, CA; at 12:41 AM ON APR 14, 2026 Effective until 02:41 AM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text:
AN AMBER ALERT IS BEING ISSUED BY THE CALIFORNIA HIGHWAY PATROL ON BEHALF OF THE LOS ANGELES POLICE DEPARTMENT.

ON APRIL 13 2026 AT 1020 PM MESSIAH EVANS WAS ABDUCTED FROM LOS ANGELES, CALIFORNIA.  MESSIAH EVANS IS A 3 YEAR OLD BLACK MALE 3 FEET 0 INCHES TALL WEIGHING 50 POUNDS WITH BLACK HAIR AND BROWN EYES  MESSIAH EVANS IS BELIEVED TO BE WEARING A BURGANDY ONESIE.

THE SUSPECT JOSHUA PENDLETON IS A 38 YEAR OLD BLACK MALE STANDING 5 FEET 11 INCHES TALL WEIGHING 265 POUNDS WITH BLACK HAIR AND HAZEL EYES. JOSHUA PENDLETONS CLOTHING IS UNKNOWN.

THE SUSPECT IS BELIEVED TO BE DRIVING A 2006 WHITE SATURN VUE WITH CALIFORNIA LICENSE PLATE 5SHE918

IF SEEN CALL 9 1 1
